metadata.description: Azure region. MUST support Foundry Realtime API.
Short product prefix used in resource names (e.g., fq)
Languages supported by the v1 quiz system
Model deployment name resolved by the agent at runtime
TTL applied to completed/expired session documents in Cosmos (003)
TTL applied to audit documents (long retention; SEC-014)
Max single voice session length in minutes (NFR-013)
Idle seconds before realtime channel auto-disconnects
Whether APIM is enabled (seeded into AppConfig as features:apim)
Tag value for finance cost center
Mandatory tags applied to the RG itself; child resources inherit via param
Tenant ID the vault is scoped to
Languages whose virtual folders should be created under questions/
Model deployment name to seed at model:deploymentName
Supported language codes (used to seed languages:supported)
Search service endpoint URL to seed at search:endpoint
Whether APIM is enabled (seeded at features:apim)
Azure region (MUST support Foundry Realtime API)
Storage account resource ID used as the hub default
Key Vault resource ID used as the hub default
Application Insights resource ID used as the hub default
Log Analytics workspace resource ID — destination of project diagnostic settings (NFR-008)
UAMI resource ID to attach to hub + project
Resource IDs to scope assignments to
UAMI resource ID attached to the agent
UAMI client ID surfaced to the agent runtime
UAMI used to run the deployment script (uami-deploy-*)
App Insights connection string (non-secret; surfaced as env var)
Model deployment name the agent uses

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail
      echo "Bootstrapping Foundry Hosted Agent: $AGENT_NAME"
      echo "Project: $PROJECT_NAME ($PROJECT_ID)"
      echo "UAMI attached: $UAMI_RESOURCE_ID (client_id=$UAMI_CLIENT_ID)"
      echo "AppConfig endpoint: $APPCONFIG_ENDPOINT"
      echo "Model deployment: $MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
      # When the Foundry Hosted Agent ARM resource type stabilises, replace
      # this script with a native Bicep resource. Until then this is the
      # bootstrap surface: it is idempotent (re-running produces the same
      # output) and only emits non-secret state.
      cat > "$AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH" <<EOF
      {
        "agentName": "$AGENT_NAME",
        "projectId": "$PROJECT_ID",
        "uamiAttached": "$UAMI_RESOURCE_ID",
        "appConfigEndpoint": "$APPCONFIG_ENDPOINT",
        "modelDeploymentName": "$MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
      }
      EOF

metadata.description: UAMI used to run the deployment script (uami-deploy-*)
Supported languages whose voice profiles must be configured
Max length of a single voice session in minutes (NFR-013)
Idle seconds before the realtime channel auto-disconnects
Model deployment name used by the realtime endpoint

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail
      echo "Configuring Realtime endpoint for agent: $AGENT_NAME"
      echo "Languages: $LANGUAGES"
      echo "Voice map: $VOICE_MAP"
      echo "Max session minutes: $MAX_MINUTES"
      echo "Idle seconds: $IDLE_SECONDS"
      echo "Model deployment: $MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
      cat > "$AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH" <<EOF
      {
        "realtimeEndpoint": "https://realtime.${PROJECT_SHORT}.foundry.azure.com",
        "voicesByLanguage": $VOICE_MAP,
        "maxSessionMinutes": $MAX_MINUTES,
        "idleSeconds": $IDLE_SECONDS
      }
      EOF
